subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God, render thanks unto God that thou hast tasted the sweetness of the love of God and hast drunk the honey of the knowledge of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکر کن خدا را که شکر محبت الله چشیدی و شهد معرفت الله نوشیدی و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
